---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

What research workflow would this enable or improve? Describe the scientist's problem, not your
proposed solution.

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working? Be specific enough to evaluate tradeoffs.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds have you tried? What existing tools partially solve this?

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing and feedback
- [ ] No

## Domain

\[ \] Literature review [ ] Hypothesis generation [ ] Experimental design [ ] Ethics / safety [ ] CLI
/ UX [ ] Integration with another tool [ ] Other (please specify)
